required_skills: Business development and end-to-end partnership lifecycle management
Prospecting, outreach, and relationship cultivation with external partners and stakeholders
Partnership deal structuring including commercial terms, revenue sharing models, and co-marketing arrangements
Market mapping and identification of high-value partnership opportunities within the ecosystem
Negotiation skills and ability to drive multi-stakeholder deals to close
CRM management and disciplined pipeline tracking for BD workflows
Written communication — partnership proposals, term sheets, and executive-ready deal summaries
Cross-functional collaboration with product, legal, and marketing to operationalize signed partnerships
preferred_skills: Experience in strategic partnerships, channel sales, or alliance management at a SaaS or technology company
Familiarity with API integrations and technical partnership models including ISV and OEM arrangements
Understanding of co-marketing, co-selling, and joint go-to-market execution frameworks
Exposure to platform ecosystem dynamics — App Store partnerships, marketplace integrations, or developer ecosystems
Network within a relevant vertical such as fintech, edtech, healthtech, or enterprise SaaS
Experience with affiliate or reseller channel program design and management
Knowledge of legal concepts in partnership agreements — NDAs, MSAs, revenue share, and exclusivity clauses
responsibilities: Identify, prioritize, and prospect high-value strategic partnership opportunities through ecosystem mapping, network outreach, and inbound partner inquiries
Own the full partnership development lifecycle from first contact through signed agreement — managing discovery calls, proposal drafting, negotiation, and contract execution
Build and maintain a disciplined partnership pipeline in Salesforce or Affinity CRM, ensuring all opportunities, communications, and deal stages are accurately tracked
Develop compelling partnership proposals, one-pagers, and commercial term frameworks that clearly articulate mutual value for prospective partners
Collaborate with product, engineering, and marketing teams to scope, launch, and optimize newly signed partnerships — translating deal terms into executable joint plans
Design and manage co-marketing and co-selling initiatives with active partners, tracking joint pipeline contribution and partner-sourced revenue attribution
Build strong long-term relationships with partner stakeholders by conducting regular business reviews, sharing performance data, and identifying growth opportunities within existing accounts
Negotiate commercial terms including revenue share models, integration milestones, SLAs, and exclusivity provisions with support from legal and finance teams
Track and report on partnership KPIs — referral volume, co-sell pipeline, partner-influenced ARR, and integration adoption — in weekly leadership reviews
Represent the company at industry conferences, partner summits, and ecosystem events to build brand credibility and source new partnership opportunities
